title: tftp bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[5.2-40]
- tftp: propagate exit codes in non-interactive mode (RHEL-96947)

[5.2-39]
- fix creation of /var/lib/tftpboot in image mode (RHEL-77491)
full_text:
[5.2-40]
- tftp: propagate exit codes in non-interactive mode (RHEL-96947)

[5.2-39]
- fix creation of /var/lib/tftpboot in image mode (RHEL-77491)

https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20678-0.html
